open.description:
Bindable open state. The component mutates `open = false` on Escape,
backdrop click, or any explicit close path, then fires `onclose`.

placeholder.description: Placeholder rendered inside the search input.

label.description: Accessible name for the dialog, wired via `aria-label`.

query.description:
Bindable search query. Mutated by the input's oninput handler.
Exposed to the items snippet so consumers can filter.
Reset to an empty string each time the palette opens.

class.description: Class merged onto the palette panel.

unsupportedProps.name: empty
unsupportedProps.description: Rendered when zero items are registered after filtering.

unsupportedProps.name: footer
unsupportedProps.description: Optional footer, e.g. for keybinding hints. Not part of the listbox.

unsupportedProps.name: items
unsupportedProps.description: Receives the current query so consumers can filter.

unsupportedProps.name: onclose
unsupportedProps.description: Fired after any close path routed through the palette close lifecycle.

unsupportedProps.name: triggerRef
unsupportedProps.description: Element to restore focus to on close. Falls back to `captureFocus()`.
